summary: Proverbs presents wisdom sayings and instruction aimed at forming moral judgment, disciplined speech, practical righteousness, and fear of the Lord as the foundation of knowledge.
historical_context: Associated primarily with Solomon, Proverbs reflects Israel’s wisdom tradition while shaping character for family, court, commerce, and community life.

mirror_water_fire.mirror: Proverbs exposes foolishness in speech, desire, laziness, pride, and injustice.
mirror_water_fire.water: Wisdom instruction cleanses the mind by ordering life under the fear of the Lord.
mirror_water_fire.fire: Habitual wisdom transforms knowledge into righteous action and stable character.
